argument.script: async (intermediate) => { try { const el = document.querySelector('script[type="application/json"]'); if (!el) return []; const data = JSON.parse(el.textContent); const posts = data?.props?.pageProps?.posts || []; return posts.slice(0, {{ limit }}).map(p => ({ content: (p.content || '').replace(/\n/g, ' ').slice(0, 80), type: p.type === 'ORIGINAL_POST' ? 'post' : p.type === 'REPOST' ? 'repost' : p.type || '', likes: p.likeCount || 0, comments: p.commentCount || 0, time: p.actionTime || p.createdAt || '', url: 'https://web.okjike.com/originalPost/' + (p.id || '') })); } catch (e) { return []; } }
